name: claude-ide-bridge
description: 140 VS Code LSP tools for Claude — diagnostics, refactoring, git, debugging, test runners, GitHub Actions, and more. Bridges Claude AI to VS Code via WebSockets with real-time IDE context.
features: LSP: go-to-definition, find-references, hover, call hierarchy, rename, code actions
Debugger: set breakpoints, start session, evaluate expressions
Git: status, diff, commit, push, pull, branch, stash
GitHub: PRs, issues, Actions runs and logs
Diagnostics: TypeScript, ESLint, Biome, Ruff, Pyright, and more
Test runners: Vitest, Jest, Pytest, Cargo
Automation: 12 event-driven hooks (file save, git events, diagnostics, PR)
Plugin system: extend with custom tools via npm packages
OAuth 2.0: remote deployment with claude.ai custom connectors
note: This file is a reference copy for registry re-submissions. Actual submission is a PR to modelcontextprotocol/registry.
